region_column: The column containing regions, provinces, or county names
date_column: The column containing the date. Refers to the year and month in which the data were recorded.
year_column: The column containing the year. Refers to the year in which the data were recorded.
month_column: The column containing month. Refers to the month in which the data were recorded.
malaria_cases_column: The column containing malaria case counts.
mean_temperature_column: Tbe column containing the average temperature.
rainfall_column: The column containing the monthly total rainfall (cumulative rainfall).
relative_humidity_column: The column containing the monthly average relative humidity.
runoff_column: The column containing the monthly total surface runoff water in the climate dataset.
geometry_column: The column containing the geographical locations (longitude and latitude) in the map data.
spi_column: The column containing Standardized Precipitation Index (SPI). It is an index used to measure drought severity.
ndvi_column: The column containing Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI). It is used as a vegetation index.
maximum_lag: Number of delay months to be considered in the model.
health_outcome_column: The column containing health outcome counts.
geography_column: The column containing geography or region names.
temperature_column: The exposure variable containing the raw temperature value.
suicides_column: The column containing mental health outcome counts.
population_column: The column containing the total population.
country_of_analysis: The country that the analysis is focused on.
